---
title: "Examples"
toc: false
---

Small, self-contained code examples that demonstrate one idea at a
time. Each example should be copy-pasteable and run end-to-end.

Planned examples (placeholders):

- A minimal Quarto document
- Reading and plotting a CSV with R
- A LaTeX document with a theorem environment and a figure
- A first Git workflow: clone, edit, commit, push
- A Quarto document that includes R, equations, and a citation
